RULES.TITLE: Game Rules
RULES.H2P_P1: All players receive a secret word, except 'The Impostor', who doesn't know it or receives a fake hint.
RULES.H2P_P2: In each round, players must describe their word using a single term. Once everyone has spoken, you vote on who you believe is the impostor.
RULES.CIVIL_DESC: Knows the real word. Must describe the word without being too obvious so the impostor doesn't guess it, but not too vague so as not to seem suspicious.
RULES.IMPOSTOR_DESC: Doesn't know the word (or has a fake hint). Must blend in among the civilians and try to guess what the secret word is.
RULES.DETECTIVE_DESC: A civilian with special permission to bet (guess the secret/impostor word) to instantly win the game in their specific mode.
RULES.CLASSIC_DESC: The group votes at the end. If a civilian is eliminated, the game continues until the civilian/impostor ratio ties or everyone is discovered.
RULES.FAST_DESC: Sudden death. If the group votes a civilian in the first round, the impostors win instantly.
RULES.DETECTIVE_MODE_DESC: Same as classic, but the Detective (if still alive) can attempt to guess the secret word at any vote. If they are right, their team wins instantly. If they fail, they are disqualified.
RULES.INFILTRATOR_DESC: Impostors are lied to, making them believe they are civilians, but the word assigned to them is a fake variation of the same context (Ex: Secret: Sushi / Impostor: Sashimi).
RULES.TEAM_DESC: Forces play with 2 or more impostors. Impostors identify each other when revealing their role to coordinate their deception.
RULES.CHAOS_DESC: The number of impostors will be completely random (even 0 or ALL players). Finding out who is who won't follow normal logic.
RULES.TYPE_WORD_DESC: The classic style. Each player takes turns saying a word related to the secret word.
RULES.TYPE_QUESTION_DESC: On their turn, each player asks a Yes or No question to anyone they want to try and find contradictions.
RULES.TYPE_DRAW_DESC: Players pass the device to take turns drawing the secret word together.

SETTINGS.TITLE: Settings
SETTINGS.DEV_INFO: Developed for the best party atmosphere.

SETUP.TITLE: Settings
SETUP.INFO_MODE_DESC: Select the rules and win conditions of the game.
SETUP.INFO_TYPE_DESC: Choose how players will interact: using words, asking questions, or drawing.
SETUP.INFO_PLAYERS_DESC: Define the names of the players participating in the game.
SETUP.INFO_IMPOSTORS_DESC: Number of impostors hidden among the players.
SETUP.INFO_DETECTIVES_DESC: Number of detectives trying to find the impostor and the secret word.
SETUP.INFO_HINTS_DESC:
Decide if impostors receive hints.
  • None: No hints, time to guess.
  • All: All impostors see the hint.
  • First: Only the first impostor to answer or draw gets the hint.
SETUP.INFO_DURATION_DESC: Global time limit for the voting and discussion phase.
SETUP.INFO_DRAW_TIME_DESC: Time limit per turn for each player to draw.
SETUP.INFO_PACKAGES_DESC: Select the word packages that will be used in the game.
SETUP.DURATION_INFO: Set if you want a global time limit to discuss, in drawing mode the time each player has to paint is configured separately in the turn time option.
SETUP.WARNING_CANNOT_START: Players, impostors, or a word package are missing to start.

SETUP_PLAYERS.TITLE: Players
SETUP_PLAYERS.MIN_WARNING: Add at least 3 players to start.

SETUP_PACKAGES.TITLE: Packages
SETUP_PACKAGES.INSTRUCTION: Select one or more word packages for your game.

SETUP_MODES.TITLE: Game Mode
SETUP_MODES.SUBTITLE: Select the mechanics that will govern this round.

PLAY.DETECTIVE_DESC: Your goal is to find the secret word. We trust you.
PLAY.NO_HINT: No hints this time. Good luck.
PLAY.ALL_ROLES_SEEN: All players have seen their role
PLAY.INSTRUCTION_WORD: Think of a word related to it.
PLAY.INSTRUCTION_QUESTION: Think of a Yes/No question to ask others.
PLAY.NO_ACTIVE_GAME: There is no active game right now.
PLAY.PASS_DEVICE: Pass the device to them to see their role.

DRAW.NO_ACTIVE_GAME: There is no active game right now.
DRAW.ALL_DONE_DESC: Everyone has drawn! Now it's time to debate and vote who you think the Impostor is.
DRAW.READY_TO_DRAW: Are you ready? You only have {{time}} seconds!

VOTE.TITLE: Discussion
VOTE.IMPOSTOR_CAUGHT_DESC: Well done! {{name}} was an impostor, but the game continues! There correspond accomplices on the loose.
VOTE.DETECTIVE_FAILED: Detective {{name}} has been eliminated for guessing incorrectly.
VOTE.CIVIL_ELIMINATED: Player {{name}} has been eliminated, but was NOT an impostor.
VOTE.DETECTIVE_FAIL_WARN: If the detective fails, they will be eliminated from the game.

RESULTS.REASON_TIME: Time ran out. The impostors escaped.
RESULTS.REASON_GUESS_FAIL: Detective {{name}} risked the word "{{guess}}" and failed miserably.
RESULTS.REASON_FAST_FAIL: Lethal fail! You chose wrong and there are no second chances in this mode.
RESULTS.REASON_IMP_WIN: The impostors equaled or outnumbered the civilians.
RESULTS.REASON_GUESS_WIN: Brilliant! Detective {{name}} guessed the secret word was "{{guess}}".
RESULTS.REASON_CIVILS_WIN: The civilians eliminated all the impostors.
RESULTS.NO_CLEAR_WIN: Game ended without a clear win.
RESULTS.LOSERS_WARN: Eliminated civilians have lost the game.

CONFIRM.TITLE: LEAVE GAME?
CONFIRM.MESSAGE: You are about to leave the current game and will lose your progress. Are you sure?
